name: PAM LLM retrieval comparison
description: Realistic prompts for comparing no-PAM, PAM 0.4.x, and PAM 0.5.x retrieval behavior with the same LLM.

queries.prompt: What is Portable Agent Memory for, and what problem does it solve?
Which PAM file should an everyday agent read first for graph-first memory lookup?
Which tool validates and queries the PAM graph, and what can it measure?
Which benchmark tool estimates memory read-volume and token reduction?
How should a markdown-only PAM workspace migrate to graph-v1 without losing markdown compatibility?
What changes when migrating from PAM 0.4.0 to 0.5.0?
What makes a PAM runbook agent-facing and verifiable?
